pages.text: <?xml version="1.0"?> <gc:Codelist xmlns:gc="http://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/ns/genericode/1.0/"> <gc:Identification> <gc:ShortName Lang="en">Transaction type</gc:ShortName> <gc:Version>1</gc:Version> </gc:Identification> <gc:ColumnSet> <gc:Column Id="id" Use="required"> <gc:ShortName>Identifier</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="name" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Name</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="description" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Description</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Key Id="idKey"> <gc:ColumnRef Ref="id"/> </gc:Key> </gc:ColumnSet> <gc:SimpleCodeList> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>1XXXXXXX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Free trade zone (position 1)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods or services in Free trade zone</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>X1XXXXXX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Deemed supply (position 2)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods or services without consideration</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XX1XXXXX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Profit Margin Scheme (position 3)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods under the profit margin scheme</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XXX1XXXX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Summary invoice (position 4)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Taxable person makes more than one supply of Goods or Services to the same person in the same calendar month</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XXXX1XXX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Continuous Supply (position 5)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods and/or services made on recurrent basis</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XXXXX1XX</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Agent billing (position 6)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Agent who is a registrant makes a supply on behalf of the principal</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XXXXXX1X</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply through E-commerce (position 7)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods or services via E-commerce</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>XXXXXXX1</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Exports (position 8)</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Supply of goods or services outside the country</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> </gc:SimpleCodeList> </gc:Codelist>
